creator: ben_choi@hotmail.com
text:
Hi,
 
My name is Ben Choi, working for Sandvine, Waterloo, ON, Canada.
I had experienced similar issue, which was displaying many gre_out() console messages.
At that moment, I could not access console at all.
After applying the fix of MPSAFE codes only, it works fine. 
No error messages on console at all.
The benefit of this fix is two-fold.
One, By removing all annoying messages, the console becomes accessible.
Two, no gre packets are dropped by this incorrect error messages.
 
As the result, I think this code is worth to merge into official build.
 
Kind regards,
 
Ben Choi
